Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: typical steps post job ad screen candidates conduct interviews make hiring decision then if hired onboarding employee add to payroll close case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model1 has edges Post Screen Screen Decide Screen Interview Decide Onboard Onboard Payroll Payroll Close so interview and decide have no ordering between them and can happen in any order after screen

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: the anomaly in Model1 is that a hiring decision may be made before interviews are completed which is not typical and could mean onboarding starts before interview

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Model1 still preserves a plausible tail of the process because after decision it enforces onboard then payroll then close

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model2 has Post before both Screen and Interview and Interview before Decide then Decide before onboarding loop then payroll xor then close

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: this means Model2 allows interviews without prior screening and also uses a loop for onboarding and a choice that can skip payroll

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: those are stronger anomalies because screening onboarding and payroll are core activities and the model allows some of them to be bypassed entirely

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: ordering mistakes are generally less harmful than making essential hire to retire activities optional so Model1 is closer to the normative process than Model2

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Model1 contains all major activities and keeps the post decision completion flow intact while Model2 permits skipping onboarding and payroll which undermines process integrity more fundamentally
